question: What event leads Saul to lose his sight temporarily, and what does he hear during that event?

choices.A: A light from heaven and a voice saying, “Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting me?”
choices.B: A storm at sea and a voice warning him about Rome
choices.C: A dream in Jerusalem and a voice naming him king
choices.D: A temple ritual and a voice telling him to stop praying

teaching.title: Saul’s encounter
teaching.body: Acts reports a heavenly light, Jesus’ words to Saul about persecution, and Saul’s temporary blindness afterward.
